system.description:
While each colorful clown expresses their philosophy in personal and unpredictable ways, they all embrace these tenets:

Delight the Downcast. A well-timed laugh can heal a broken spirit. Never ignore suffering if you can lift it with mirth.

Mock the Mighty. Authority must not go unchallenged. A pie in the face humbles as surely as a blade.

Color the World. Paint the gray with song, dress the gloom in spectacle, and wear your truth boldly.

Die Laughing. Fear has no claim on you. If you must fall, fall with a smile and make it a show worth remembering.
